# kCVImageBufferDisplayHeightKey

**Global Variable**

A key to the display height of the image buffer.

## Declaration

```swift
let kCVImageBufferDisplayHeightKey: CFString
```

## Discussion

The display height value is of type [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/CoreFoundation/CFNumber].

## Constants

- **kCVImageBufferDisplayWidthKey**: A key to the display width of the image buffer.
